title: Wires driven through virtual interface traced improperly

features.name: interface with wire signal
features.description: Code should include an interface declaration containing a wire signal

features.name: virtual interface handle in class
features.description: Code should include a class with a virtual interface as a member variable

features.name: class task driving interface signal
features.description: Code should include a class task that drives a signal through a virtual interface handle

features.name: interface signal assigned to wire
features.description: Code should include an assign statement connecting an interface signal to a top-level wire

features.name: tracing with VCD enabled
features.description: Code should include tracing enabled with $dumpfile and $dumpvars for VCD output
